inputs.name: accessibleDescription
inputs.description: Defines the accessible description of the component.

inputs.name: accessibleDescriptionRef
inputs.description: Receives id(or many ids) of the elements that describe the input.

inputs.name: accessibleName
inputs.description: Defines the aria-label attribute for the component.

inputs.name: accessibleNameRef
inputs.description: Receives id(or many ids) of the elements that label the component.

inputs.name: calendarWeekNumbering
inputs.description:
Defines how to calculate calendar weeks and first day of the week.
If not set, the calendar will be displayed according to the currently set global configuration.

inputs.name: disabled
inputs.description: Determines whether the component is displayed as disabled.

inputs.name: displayFormat
inputs.description: Determines the format, displayed in the input field.

inputs.name: formatPattern
inputs.description: Determines the format, displayed in the input field.

inputs.name: hideWeekNumbers
inputs.description:
Defines the visibility of the week numbers column.

*Note:** For calendars other than Gregorian,
the week numbers are not displayed regardless of what is set.

inputs.name: maxDate
inputs.description:
Determines the maximum date available for selection.

*Note:** If the formatPattern property is not set, the maxDate value must be provided in the ISO date format (yyyy-MM-dd).

inputs.name: minDate
inputs.description:
Determines the minimum date available for selection.

*Note:** If the formatPattern property is not set, the minDate value must be provided in the ISO date format (yyyy-MM-dd).

inputs.name: name
inputs.description:
Determines the name by which the component will be identified upon submission in an HTML form.

*Note:** This property is only applicable within the context of an HTML Form element.

inputs.name: open
inputs.description: Defines the open or closed state of the popover.

inputs.name: placeholder
inputs.description:
Defines a short hint, intended to aid the user with data entry when the
component has no value.

*Note:** When no placeholder is set, the format pattern is displayed as a placeholder.
Passing an empty string as the value of this property will make the component appear empty - without placeholder or format pattern.

inputs.name: primaryCalendarType
inputs.description:
Sets a calendar type used for display.
If not set, the calendar type of the global configuration is used.

inputs.name: readonly
inputs.description: Determines whether the component is displayed as read-only.

inputs.name: required
inputs.description: Defines whether the component is required.

inputs.name: secondaryCalendarType
inputs.description:
Defines the secondary calendar type.
If not set, the calendar will only show the primary calendar type.

inputs.name: showClearIcon
inputs.description: Defines whether the clear icon of the input will be shown.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: Defines a formatted date value.

inputs.name: valueFormat
inputs.description: Determines the format, used for the value attribute.

inputs.name: valueState
inputs.description: Defines the value state of the component.

outputs.name: ui5Change
outputs.description: Fired when the input operation has finished by pressing Enter or on focusout.

outputs.name: ui5Close
outputs.description: Fired after the component's picker is closed.

outputs.name: ui5Input
outputs.description: Fired when the value of the component is changed at each key stroke.

outputs.name: ui5Open
outputs.description: Fired after the component's picker is opened.

outputs.name: ui5ValueStateChange
outputs.description:
Fired before the value state of the component is updated internally.
The event is preventable, meaning that if it's default action is
prevented, the component will not update the value state.
